title: Radha Krishna
desc: A divine tale of eternal love between Lord Krishna and Radha, symbolizing spiritual devotion and emotional depth, as they transcend time and form to unite hearts across ages.

title: Sri Renuka Yellamma
desc: Goddess Parvati incarnates as Renuka and Yellamma to safeguard against evil in royal and village settings.

title: Nuvve Nuvve
desc: Doting millionaire's daughter falls for a middle-class man. Father's wealth bias prompts efforts to separate the couple.

title: Paape Maa Jeevanajyothi
desc: Jyothi seeks acceptance but faces turmoil as daughter Jeevana is kidnapped, jeopardizing their newfound peace.

title: Ninnu Kori
desc: Betrayed and cast out, Chandrakala battles to prove her innocence and earn love. Can she reclaim her place and rewrite her destiny?

title: Brahma Mudi
desc: Mother arranges weddings for talented daughters. Affairs take an unexpected turn with an affluent family.

title: Paluke Bangaramayenaa
desc: An emotional devotional drama where faith, betrayal, and forgiveness collide when a god-devotee confronts unforeseen moral dilemmas in his spiritual journey.

title: Saptapadi
desc: A traditional tale explores seven sacred vows of marriage, following a couple as they navigate responsibilities and emotional challenges in pursuit of lasting harmony and trust.

title: Vaarasuralu
desc: A dramatic story follows generational conflicts, ambitions, and relationships as characters navigate power, legacy, and emotional struggles in a compelling narrative.

title: Guppedantha Manasu
desc: Anupama urges Mahindra to report Rishi's disappearance. Next day, Vasudhara sets out on a mission to locate him.

title: Aadi Keshava
desc: When an urban guy finds himself in the rugged heart of Rayalaseema, he's caught up in local conflicts and must navigate unexpected challenges to settle the scores.

desc: A heartwarming tale of a Mother and Daughter navigating through unexpected challenges, strengthening their bond and understanding each other in new ways.

desc: The show returns for its ninth season, promising more drama and stronger emotions after eight successful seasons, as creators continue to captivate fans.

desc: A spiritual drama following a devoted woman's journey to bring peace to her household, balancing duty, faith, and her quest to spark harmony and inner light.

desc: A middle-class family comedy exploring generational quirks, everyday dramas, and the simple joys of domestic life as they navigate traditions, aspirations, and unity.

desc: Circumstances force Meena, a family-centric girl, to marry Balu, a thug. Will this unfortunate marriage turn into love?

desc: A family drama explores relationships, traditions, and emotional bonds as characters navigate everyday challenges, creating a heartfelt and engaging narrative.
